sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
After UP:
- ID=3: B 51 (was B 50) - black bar on right edge, 51 pixels (increased by 1)
- ID=4: B 40 (was B 40) - black face, 40 pixels (unchanged)
- ID=5: c 45 (was c 45) - charcoal shape, 45 pixels (unchanged)
- ID=6-10: W 1 each - white dots, 1 pixel each (unchanged)
- ID=11: Y 45 (was Y 45) - yellow shape, 45 pixels (unchanged)
- ID=12: Y 13 (was Y 14) - yellow face, 13 pixels (decreased by 1)
- ID=13: B 63 (was B 63) - bottom bar, 63 pixels (unchanged)
So UP transfers 1 pixel from the yellow face (ID=12) to the black bar on the right edge (ID=3).
SPACE transfers pixels from the yellow face to the black bar on the right edge. UP also transfers pixels from the yellow face to the black bar on the right edge. So both SPACE and UP transfer pixels from the yellow face to the black bar on the right edge.
Let me try DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT actions.
